body:
Subject: Q4 Confirmations Review - Scheduling Request

Team,

We need to schedule a Q4 review of pending derivatives confirmations before Friday's risk committee meeting. We have approximately three weeks of backlog to address, stemming from the regulatory uncertainty on the counterparty deal.

Please provide your availability for tomorrow or Thursday so we can set the agenda and distribute materials in advance.

I'll need confirmation of attendees and any items requiring discussion from each of you by end of day today.

Sara Shackleton
Enron Wholesale Services
Thursday 2pm works. Jeff will cover the EnronOnline backlog items.

Thursday 2pm confirmed. 

Louise - please have Jeff ready to walk through the EnronOnline backlog. I'll circulate the draft agenda by EOD today.

Sara
